CustomField.formula:
IF( TEXT(CCO_form_for_bank_owned_properties__c )="","Select CCO option to generate Purchase Agreement", HYPERLINK( "/apex/APXTConga4__Conga_Composer?serverUrl="+$Api.Enterprise_Server_URL_370
+"&Id="+Id+
"&TemplateId=00P3m000019bq8E"+
"&TemplateGroup=AA,Merges" +"&OFN=Purchase+Agreement+"+HOMEtracker__Property__r.Name +"&QueryId=[ITSProperty]a211N000001eGcY" +"?pv0="+HOMEtracker__Property__r.Id+",[ITSMunicipality]a211N000001eGeG" +"?pv0="+Municipality_ID__c+",[ITSApplicantContact]a211N000001eGfi" +"?pv0="+HOMEtracker__Applicant__r.Id +"&DS7=3"
, "Generate Purchase Agreement", "_blank") )
CustomField.label: Purchase Agreement
